productDisplayName: Puma Men Calcetto White Casual Shoes
description: A low profile football sneaker, the puma PowerCat Calcetto lives up to its name, offering great speed and traction with maximum comfort and grip on turf. Simple and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and tees for casual outings.
